name: vozka-runner-image
//: Slimmed workspace root baked into the runner image. The `overrides` pins EVERY oblaka-iac to the vendored tarball (docker/vendor/, packed from the local sibling oblaka by docker/prepare.ts) — mirroring the repo root's `oblaka-iac: file:../oblaka` — because the npm-published oblaka-iac predates the programmatic deploy() the M1 engine calls. @propustka/* resolve from npm; wrangler is installed globally in the image (on PATH).
